title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the following measures that governments could take to improve public health, then decide which two would be the most effective.

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some measures governments could take to improve public health.
Now decide which two measures would be the most effective in improving people's health.
